headline: There Is A Corporate Bond ETF Retirees Are Using to Replace CD Income in 2026
summary: With the Federal Reserve having cut rates by 75 basis points since early 2025, CD yields have softened noticeably. Retirees hunting for income are increasingly looking at ETFs to fill the gap. One fund surfacing in those conversations is Columbia Research Enhanced Real Estate ETF (NYSEARCA:CRED), but there is a critical detail to understand before ... There Is A Corporate Bond ETF Retirees Are Using to Replace CD Income in 2026

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on Public Storage, Raises Price Target to $311
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Steve Sakwa   maintains Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) with a In-Line and raises the price target from $302 to $311.
